description.en: A stunning primate with golden-orange fur and a unique blue face found in China's high-altitude forests.
description.zh: 一种拥有金橘色毛发和独特蓝色面孔的迷人灵长类动物，生活在中国的高海拔森林中。

anatomy.en: They have thick, golden fur to stay warm in snowy winters and a very short nose to prevent frostbite. Their face is a striking pale blue color.
anatomy.zh: 它们长着厚厚的金色长毛以在寒冬保暖，鼻子非常短小以防冻伤。它们的脸部呈现出引人的浅蓝色。

ecology_and_behavior.en: These monkeys live in large groups and are masters of acrobatics, leaping across trees. They love eating tree lichens, leaves, and fruits.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 这些猴子成群生活，是树间的杂技大师。它们非常喜欢吃地衣、树叶和水果。

habitat_and_distribution.en: They live in the temperate forests of central and southwest China, often at altitudes where snow covers the ground for months.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 它们生活在中国中部和西南部的温带森林中，那里经常半年时间都被白雪覆盖。
